---
pagetitle: "UBC Math Society"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
[∑]{.hero-symbol .hero-sym-1}[∫]{.hero-symbol .hero-sym-2}[π]{.hero-symbol .hero-sym-3}

[The University of British Columbia]{.hero-eyebrow}

# UBC Math Society

Problem-solving nights, competitions, guest lectures, and a friendly community for everyone who enjoys mathematics.

[Upcoming events](events.qmd){.btn .btn-hero-primary .me-2} [Get involved](about.qmd){.btn .btn-hero-outline}
:::

::: {.grid .home-cards}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .home-card}
[📅]{.card-icon}

### Events

Weekly problem-solving sessions, guest lectures from faculty, and socials throughout the term.

[Browse events →](events.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .home-card}
[🏆]{.card-icon}

### Competitions

The team-based **Mathathon** and the bracket-style **Integration Bee** — open to all skill levels.

[Mathathon →](mathathon.qmd)<br>
[Integration Bee →](integration_bee.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .home-card}
[📚]{.card-icon}

### Resources

Textbook picks, online courses, competition archives, and Polya's problem-solving method.

[Explore resources →](resources.qmd)
:::

:::

::: {.home-cta}
## Get involved

No membership forms, no prerequisites — just show up to any event. Want a nudge when something's happening?

[✉️ Email us](mailto:mathsoc@ubc.ca){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} [📅 Subscribe to the calendar](mathsoc-calendar.ics){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
